# AI Tool Disclosure — WCS 240 Final Project

Per the WCS 240 syllabus AI policy, this document logs any use of AI-powered tools in the creation of the NU Volleyball Club website and promotional video.

## Tool usage

### Claude (Anthropic)
**Used for:** initial scaffolding of the Next.js project structure, drafting placeholder copy for the About page, generating the Tailwind design system, writing README.md training instructions for the client.

**Extent:** Code structure, component scaffolding, and first-draft copy were generated by Claude and then reviewed, edited, and personalized by the group. Final content was rewritten and approved by the client.

### [Add other tools as used]

### About page body copy
Tool: Claude (Anthropic)
Generated text:
> "NU Volleyball Club is the volleyball community of Nazarbayev University — a place where students compete at the highest level, host campus tournaments, and build a culture of teamwork, discipline, and passion for the game."
>
> "We field competitive men's and women's teams, host three annual tournaments, and partner with NU organizations to give back to the community through charity volleyball events."
>
> "Whether you want to spike in front of a packed Sports Center, manage our social channels, film our matches, or organize campus-wide tournaments — there's a place on this team for you."

## Summary

All AI-assisted text was reviewed by group members and the client before publication. The creative decisions, design direction, photo selection, and final wording represent the group's and client's own judgment, not the AI's.
